task_completion.description: Format the report title and main sections as Heading 1.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the title 'CONFIDENTIAL: ADOPTION HOME STUDY REPORT' and main sections (e.g., 'Introduction', 'Family Background') appearing larger and bolder than the body text, indicating Heading 1 styles were applied.

task_completion.description: Format the applicant sections as Heading 2.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Applicant 1: Michael' and 'Applicant 2: Sarah' formatted as a secondary heading style, distinct from both the main headings and the regular body text.

task_completion.description: Convert the demographics information into a table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a visible grid/table structure in the document containing the demographic keywords (Sterling, 1984, 1985, Engineer, Nurse, 2010) instead of a plain text paragraph.
Look for the specific quote sentences (e.g., 'We always knew we wanted to adopt') being indented, italicized, or otherwise styled distinctly from the surrounding text.

task_completion.description: Insert a page break before the Recommendation and Summary section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Recommendation and Summary' heading positioned exactly at the top of a new document page, with empty space at the bottom of the previous page.
Look for the agent clicking the Save button (floppy disk icon), using File > Save, or the absence of an unsaved changes indicator (like an asterisk) in the Calligra Words window title bar.

integrity.description: The agent must interact with the Calligra Words interface to apply formatting.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for usage of the Calligra Words toolbar, styles menu, or table insertion dialogs. The agent should not use terminal commands to modify the ODT file's internal XML directly.

integrity.description: The demographics table must be a real table, not simulated with text spacing.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for actual table cell borders or table UI elements when the table is selected, rather than text aligned with spaces or tabs.

integrity.description: The agent did not edit the ODT file in a plain text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the formatting is done visually within Calligra Words, not by opening the file in a text editor like nano or gedit.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document is an ODT file edited in Calligra Words. Expected formatting based on guidelines: 1. Report Title: 'CONFIDENTIAL: ADOPTION HOME STUDY REPORT'. 2. H1 Sections: Introduction, Motivation for Adoption, Family Background, Physical Environment, Financial Status, References, Recommendation and Summary. 3. H2 Sections: Applicant 1: Michael, Applicant 2: Sarah. 4. Table Keywords: Sterling, 1984, 1985, Engineer, Nurse, 2010. 5. Quotes to format: 'We always knew we wanted to adopt', 'My childhood was filled with outdoor activities', 'Our parenting philosophy is based on mutual respect'. 6. Page Break: Must be immediately before 'Recommendation and Summary'. 7. Signature: 'Sarah Jenkins'.
